title: anthemis muricata
intro: Anthemis muricata, also known as Chamomile, is a low-growing perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Anthemis muricata include promoting relaxation and reducing anxiety, as well as aiding in the treatment of insomnia and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Anthemis muricata is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
